caption: A man wearing a grey blazer over a light-colored button-down shirt and brown trousers stands and speaks in front of a backdrop repeatedly featuring the logo and text "UNITED STATES INSTITUTE OF PEACE". In the first frame, a blue title card is superimposed on the left side with the text "Dr. Emile Bruneau", "Research Scientist, Saxelab", and "Massachusetts Institute of Technology". As the scene progresses, the camera angle widens to reveal a wooden podium to the man's right and a United States flag and another blue organizational flag standing behind him. He gestures with his hands while speaking, moving from a neutral posture with his hands slightly raised to a wider gesture with his arms extended. The background remains constant, and he continues to stand in the center of the stage throughout the sequence.
